title: HeadDB
description: Database with thousands of custom heads.
body:
# **HeadDB** *Thousands of custom Minecraft heads—instantly accessible in‑game!* --- ## 🌟 Features Overview - **Heads Library** Continuously updated with community submissions. - **Favorites Menu** Right‑click any head to favorite it. - **Local Heads** Automatically collects the heads of players who have joined your server. - **Advanced Search** ``` /hdb search [filters] ``` Filter by category, tags, ids. - **Give Command** ``` /hdb give ``` --- ## Permissions headdb.command.open - Open the GUI
headdb.command. - Access to a specific sub comamnd (Example: search,give)
headdb.category. - Open specific category
headdb.category.local - Open local heads
headdb.category.favorites - Open favorites menu
headdb.category.custom - Open custom categories menu
--- ## ⚙️ Installation 1. **Server**: Paper or Spigot 2. **Java**: Version **21** or newer 3. **Plugin JAR**: Drop `HeadDB.jar` into your `/plugins` folder 4. **Restart** your server --- ## 🤝 Contribute & Support - **GitHub Repository** Contribute code, submit pull requests, or log bugs: https://github.com/TheSilentPro/HeadDB - **Issue Tracker** https://github.com/TheSilentPro/HeadDB/issues - **Discord** Suggest heads on the discord server: https://discord.com/invite/RJsVvVd ---
